case_title: YUE LI VS. UCSF SCHOOL OF DENTISTRY

docket_entries.description: PEREMPTORY CHALLENGE - MAILED TO PLAINTIFF
ORDER RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE. THE REQUEST IS DENIED.
RETURN MAIL - SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER - SENT TO DEFENDANT / UNABLE TO FORWARD -
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-12-2020 - CONTINUED TO JUN-11-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-11-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO SEP-03-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-03-2020 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO NOV-18-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF YUE LI IS PRESENT VIA COURTCALL. DEFENDANT UCSF SCHOOL OF DENTISTRY, REPRESENTED BY CAROL V. HOLLAND, CLAIMS HANDLER IS PRESENT. COURT INFORMS PLAINTIFF THAT THERE IS A STATUTORY LIMIT OF 6 MONTHS TO FILE A CLIAIM AGAINST A PUBLIC ENTITY. AND THE THE CLAIM MUST FIRST BE FILED FIRST WITH THAT PUBLICE ENTITIY (UCSF SCHOOL OF DENTISTERY) BEFORE BRINGING A CLAIM IN SMALL CLAIMS. DEFENDANT STATES THAT A FORMAL CLAIM WAS NOT RECEIVED BY PLAINTIFF. HEARING IS CONTINUED BY COURT TO ALLOW THE PARTIES REVIEW OF EVIDENCE IN SUPPORT OF CLAIM. PLAINTIFF STATES THAT HER EVIDENTIARY DOCUMENTS WERE MAILED TO THE COURT, BUT THE COURT HAS NOT RECIEVED ANY SUCH DOCUMENTS. PLAINTIFF IS INSTRUCTED TO RESUBMIT EVIDENTIARY DOCUMENTS TO DEFENDANT AS WELL AS DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE TO THE COURT IF SHE PLANS ON COURTCALL APPEARANCE. PLAINTIFF IS INSTRUCTED THAT SHE WILL NEED TO SUBMIT A NEW REQUEST TO APPEAR BY COURTCALL TO THE COURT FOR THE NEXT HEARING. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) CLAIMS HE IS AN EMPLOYEE: ONE AND THE SAME. FILED BY DEFENDANT UCSF SCHOOL OF DENTISTRY
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LI, YUE AS TO DEFENDANT UCSF SCHOOL OF DENTISTRY
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT UCSF SCHOOL OF DENTISTRY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-09-2020 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAR-18-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF YUE LI IS NOT PRESENT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT KENNETH NG, CLINICAL PROFESSOR UCSF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT TIM REBBERT, CLAIMS REP, UCSF (HE STATED IS ONE IN THE SAME AS BUT NEVER SAID SEDGWICK). COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
